summary.lv: Entain NCE meklē Sportsbook Analytics vadītāju, kurš vadīs analītikas funkciju azartspēļu platformai un veicinās datu vadītu kultūru.
summary.en: Entain NCE seeks a Sportsbook Analytics Manager to lead the analytics function, driving a data-driven culture and delivering insights for one of the industry's most ambitious betting operations.
